title: Record Inspection & Data Visualization
summary: Finalized MITBIH record list, documented file formats, and reviewed LTAFDB dataset structure including all 75 records and their annotation types.
completed_tasks: Moved 04043 from caution to excluded (bad blocks confirmed)
Added 05091, 08465, 08475 back into the usable set after re-inspection
Reviewed all 75 LTAFDB records: sampling frequency 128 Hz, 2 leads, signal length 2.8M–12.1M samples
Catalogued LTAFDB annotation symbols: N, A, V, Q, +, and rhythm labels including (AFIB, (N, (VT, (SBR, (SVTA, (AB, (B, (T, (IVR
Confirmed binary label mapping for LTAFDB: (AFIB → AFib, (N → Normal

file_format_reference..hea: Metadata: record name, leads, sampling frequency, signal length, start time

next_week_plan.focus: Training split — segment LTAFDB into 80/20 train/test split
goals: Apply 30-second windowing with 50% overlap to LTAFDB
Perform patient-level 80/20 train/test split on LTAFDB
Label each window as AFib or Normal based on dominant rhythm annotation
Begin preprocessing pipeline: bandpass filter + resampling to 128 Hz
